API Collection# Model I/O Data Types

## [Topics](/documentation/modelio/model-i-o-data-types#topics)

### [Data Types](/documentation/modelio/model-i-o-data-types#Data-Types)

[`struct MDLAxisAlignedBoundingBox`](/documentation/modelio/mdlaxisalignedboundingbox)The minimal volume containing an object, used by the [`boundingBox(atTime:)`](/documentation/modelio/mdlobject/boundingbox(attime:)) method.[`typealias MDLVoxelIndex`](/documentation/modelio/mdlvoxelindex)A 4-component vector encoding the location of a voxel in a voxel array and describing its relation to an object’s volume.## [See Also](/documentation/modelio/model-i-o-data-types#see-also)
